title: senecio hercynicus subsp. durmitorensis
intro: Senecio hercynicus subsp. durmitorensis, also known as Durmitor ragwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio hercynicus subsp. durmitorensis can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
